title: Make the PERFECT Videos with Claude Code (Full Workflow)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a full end-to-end AI video generation workflow powered by Claude Code that automates planning, coding, voice, visuals, music, and post-production. The system uses Archon as an orchestration harness and HyperFrames as the video generation framework, requiring only a single command to produce finished video output.
